meaning: 浜ㄤ集璧涘痉閮鑻卞浗鑻辨牸鍏伴儭鍚峕
examples: The main textile producing regions of Britain are the east Yorkshire and humberside, and northern Ireland.
Humberside Fire and Rescue confirmed it was called to the Tesco store in Scunthorpe.
The drivers were detected as part of a three-day operation undertaken by Humberside Police.
Humberside Police said it was too early to speculate what had caused the collision.
